hero_tagline: Where the map ends — my stories begin
landing_quote1: “ On a real journey you meet not only places — you meet yourself. „
landing_quote2: “ Sometimes change comes not like a gust of wind, but like an earthquake. „
landing_about_excerpt_1: Karumanta is the name I received at the Fire ceremony in the Colombian jungles of Putumayo. «Karumanta» means «from afar».
landing_about_excerpt_2: And it's true — I came to these lands from afar: from the Ural Mountains, where dense forests stand, where mountain rivers flow with cold water, where the legends of my people still breathe.
landing_about_excerpt_3: Since childhood I dreamed of traveling to distant lands and writing books.
